sql_array: CREATE TABLE stock_prices_extended(    `date`   Date,    `open`   Float32,    `high`   Float32,    `low`    Float32,    `close`  Float32,    `volume` UInt32) Engine = Memory;

SELECT    date,    close,    lagInFrame(close + 5.5, 1, null) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC) AS previous_day_close,    COALESCE(ROUND(close - previous_day_close, 2)) AS delta    FROM stock_prices_extended ORDER BY date ASC;

SELECT    a.date,    a.close,    a.open,    COALESCE((a.close - lagInFrame(a.close, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY a.date)), 0) AS delta,    (select SUM(b.volume) FROM stock_prices_extended b WHERE b.date <= a.date) AS cum_volume    FROM stock_prices_extended a ORDER BY a.date DESC;

CREATE TABLE stock_prices_analysis AS    SELECT date,    close,    rounding_sum AS overall_avg    FROM (    SELECT date, close, AVG(close + lagInFrame(close, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY date)) AS rounding_sum    FROM stock_prices_extended    GROUP BY date, close    HAVING close > 100)    ORDER BY overall_avg DESC;
SELECT    date,    close,    (close + COALESCE(NULLIF(lagInFrame(close, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY date), 0), 0)) AS refined_close    FROM stock_prices_extended    WHERE refined_close IS NOT NULL;

SELECT    date,    high,    low,    lagInFrame(high, 2, high) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC) AS two_days_high,    (high - two_days_high) AS high_difference    FROM stock_prices_extended    WHERE low > 100.0;
SELECT    date,    MAX(low + lagInFrame(high, 1, NULL)) AS peak_value    FROM stock_prices_extended    GROUP BY date    HAVING peak_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date DESC;
